items.title: Dawn of the Apex Agentic Adversary
items.summary:
We are standing at the end of an era we never thought to mourn: the era of human-speed threats.

For years, cybersecurity moved to a rhythm organizations could follow. A researcher found a bug, a CVE was cataloged, a ven...

items.title: cdk8s 2.70.80
items.summary: This is the core library of Cloud Development Kit (CDK) for Kubernetes (cdk8s). cdk8s apps synthesize into standard Kubernetes manifests which can be applied to any Kubernetes cluster.

items.title: Stealthy Mistic backdoor linked to ransomware access broker KongTuke
items.summary: A new backdoor dubbed Mistic has been observed in financially motivated attacks targeting organizations in the insurance, education, IT, and professional services sectors. [...]
